**AlphaMark**

AlphaMark is a benchmarking pipeline for evaluating financial forecasts using profit-and-loss (PnL)–based performance metrics. The pipeline is designed to take financial time series data and user-defined predictive signals as input and produce a standardized set of evaluation statistics and visual summaries in the form of an automated PDF report.

More information about setting up the pipeline and output details can be found in the Alpha Mark Guide (https://www.overleaf.com/read/vkdtddmdmfxh#ffc936). Feel free to reach out to dhruvpatel97@g.ucla.edu or lihaoran@g.ucla.edu if there are any questions/issues.
